ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data record */,
  "btc_market_price" REAL /* Market price of Bitcoin on that date */,
  "btc_total_bitcoins" REAL /* Total number of Bitcoins in circulation */,
  "btc_market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of Bitcoin */,
  "btc_trade_volume" REAL /* Total trade volume of Bitcoin */,
  "btc_blocks_size" REAL /* Total size of blocks in Bitcoin network */,
  "btc_avg_block_size" REAL /* Average block size in Bitcoin network */,
  "btc_n_orphaned_blocks" INTEGER /* Number of orphaned blocks */,
  "btc_n_transactions_per_block" INTEGER /* Number of transactions per block */,
  "btc_median_confirmation_time" INTEGER /* Median confirmation time for transactions */,
  "btc_hash_rate" REAL /* Hash rate of the Bitcoin network */,
  "btc_difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty of mining Bitcoin */,
  "btc_miners_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by miners */,
  "btc_transaction_fees" REAL /* Transaction fees collected */,
  "btc_cost_per_transaction_percent" REAL /* Percentage cost per transaction */,
  "btc_cost_per_transaction" REAL /* Cost per transaction in USD */,
  "btc_n_unique_addresses" INTEGER /* Number of unique addresses used */,
  "btc_n_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions on the date */,
  "btc_n_transactions_total" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions to date */,
  "btc_n_transactions_excluding_popular" INTEGER /* Number of transactions excluding popular ones */,
  "btc_n_transactions_excluding_chains_longer_than_100" INTEGER /* Number of transactions excluding chains longer than 100 */,
  "btc_output_volume" REAL /* Output volume of transactions */,
  "btc_estimated_transaction_volume" REAL /* Estimated transaction volume in USD */,
  "btc_estimated_transaction_volume_usd" REAL /* Estimated transaction volume in USD (detailed) */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange from which the data is sourced */,
  "api_response_time" REAL /* API response time in seconds */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data was updated */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, investor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who initiated the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Login time of the user */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Logout time of the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for detailed device and browser information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, volume spike) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert to trigger */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert check (e.g., every 5 minutes, hourly) */,
  "alert_window" TEXT /* Time window over which the alert should be active (e.g., last 24 hours) */,
  "alert_channel" TEXT /* Channel for alert delivery (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., triggered, not triggered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the transaction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data related to the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of Bitcoin transacted */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the transaction (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate at the time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_source" TEXT /* Source of the transaction (e.g., exchange, wallet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "btc_price" REAL /* Price of Bitcoin on that date */,
  "btc_volume" REAL /* Volume of Bitcoin traded on that date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of Bitcoin on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of Bitcoin on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of Bitcoin on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of Bitcoin on that date */,
  "price_change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "blockchain_stats" (
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blockchain stat record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stat record */,
  "block_count" INTEGER /* Total number of blocks created on that date */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Total number of transactions on that date */,
  "hash_rate" REAL /* Hash rate of the blockchain on that date */,
  "block_size" REAL /* Size of the block */,
  "block_time" REAL /* Time taken to mine the block */,
  "block_reward" REAL /* Reward given to the miner for mining the block */,
  "block_transactions" INTEGER /* Number of transactions in the block */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blockchain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blockchain_stats_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "mining_data" (
  "mining_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mining data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the mining data record */,
  "hash_rate" REAL /* Hash rate of the Bitcoin mining network */,
  "difficulty" REAL /* Difficulty of mining Bitcoin */,
  "miners_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by miners on that date */,
  "mining_pool" TEXT /* Name of the mining pool */,
  "mining_profitability" REAL /* Profitability of mining on that date */,
  "mining_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of mining operations */,
  "mining_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with mining */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mining_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mining_data_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES market_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user this setting belongs to */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key for the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value for the setting */,
  "theme_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "language_preference" TEXT /* User's preferred language */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's preferred timezone */,
  "data_privacy_preference" TEXT /* User's preferences for data privacy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, bug report, feature request) */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "feedback_response" TEXT /* Response to the user's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
